name: LLaMA 13B
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only Transformer (RMSNorm, SwiGLU, rotary position embeddings)
note: LLaMA-1 13B; Meta reported it outperforming GPT-3 175B on most benchmarks despite being far smaller.
tpsNote: Original LLaMA-1 predates most public RTX 4090 llama.cpp benchmarks (which target Llama 2/3); no verified figure for this exact checkpoint was found.

results.notes: 0-shot, Table 3 'Zero-shot performance on Common Sense Reasoning tasks'

0-shot, Table 3. Note: this exceeds the taxonomy's typical 40-50 range for this slug, but is the exact figure printed in the paper (confirmed via direct PDF text extraction) — GPT-3 175B and PaLM 540B score even higher (57.6/53.4) on the same table row, so a 13B model at 56.4 is plausible for this particular eval setup.
RACE-high split, Table 6 'Reading Comprehension' (RACE-middle 61.6 not mapped, no taxonomy slug for it)

pass@1 (maj1@k variant separately reported as 8.8), Table 7. Note: below the taxonomy's typical 20-100 range, but this is the genuine, low, published figure for this small non-math-tuned 2023 base model.
5-shot, Table 9 MMLU breakdown (Humanities 45.0 / STEM 35.8 / Social Sciences 53.8 / Other 53.3 / Average 46.9 — average matches the existing corpus entry exactly)

3-shot. Not in the original LLaMA-1 paper — this is Meta's own re-evaluation of LLaMA-1 13B as a baseline in Table 3 of the later Llama 2 paper (grouped-benchmark comparison table), where it's reported alongside Llama-1 13B's MMLU=46.9 which exactly matches the existing corpus entry, corroborating this row's reliability.
3-5 shot, English tasks average. Same source/table as the BBH addition above (Llama 2 paper's Table 3 baseline comparison).

verificationNotes: Confirmed 13B params, 2023-02-24 release date, and gated non-commercial license via Meta's official LLaMA blog post (fetched directly). Confirmed via arxiv abstract page that the paper explicitly states 'LLaMA-13B outperforms GPT-3 (175B) on most benchmarks' (verbatim), supporting the note. All 8 result rows (HellaSwag 79.2, ARC-Challenge 52.7, WinoGrande 73, MMLU 46.9, GSM8k 17.8, HumanEval 15.8, MBPP 22, TriviaQA 56.6) confirmed as literal figures in arxiv 2302.13971 Tables 3/5/7/8/9 (fetched directly).
